meta.note: DO NOT hand-edit this file. Edit layer files then run assemble-model.ps1.

services.label: EVA Brain API v2
services.notes: Phase 1-4 implemented (453 tests, 71% coverage). Phase 5-6 (translations, settings, assistants) pending.

services.label: EVA Roles API
services.notes: RBAC authority. Returns persona feature flags for a given actor OID.

services.label: EVA Admin Face
services.notes: 3/10 screens POC only. 0/29 real backend endpoints wired. Phase 2 target: Mar 1-17 2026.

services.label: EVA Chat Face
services.notes: ChatInterface.tsx fully implemented (21/21 tests). 4 BackendApiClient endpoints scaffolded with USE_MOCK guard.

services.label: EVA Agent Fleet
services.notes: Generates React screens from Epics. 1/10 agents validated (screen-admin-crud-table).

services.label: Azure API Management
services.notes: APIM import scheduled Mar 29-30 2026. Key Vault wiring Mar 31 - Apr 4 2026.

services.label: Azure AI Foundry
services.notes: Model deployments: gpt-5.1-chat (agent-fleet), gpt-4o (brain-api). Both live in sandbox.

services.label: EVA Jurisprudence / Engineered Case Law
services.notes: Case law ingestion pipeline. Populates case-law and statutes search indexes.

services.label: AssistMe (Legacy)
services.notes: EVA v1.x predecessor. Retained for reference. Not actively developed.

personas.label: Administrator
personas.notes: Full access including persona management. max_tokens_per_turn: 8000. Source: personas.yml.

personas.label: Legal Researcher
personas.notes: Read-only access to case law and statutes. max_tokens_per_turn: 4000. Source: personas.yml.

personas.label: Legal Clerk
personas.notes: Limited access — keyword_search and chat_completion only. max_tokens_per_turn: 1000. Source: personas.yml.

personas.label: Auditor
personas.notes: Read-only audit log access. Required by AuditLogsPage (/admin/audit/logs). Phase 2. Source: EVA-FACES-MASTER-TRACKER.md.

personas.label: Support Agent
personas.notes: Help desk integration. Required by SupportTicketsPage (/admin/support/tickets). Phase 2.

personas.label: Machine Agent (Service Principal)
personas.notes: Internal service-to-service calls via Entra app registration / managed identity. Used by agent-fleet and pipeline orchestrators.

personas.label: Viewer (Portal User)
personas.notes: Base authenticated user accessing EVA Portal (/), Sprint Board (/devops/sprint). Lowest privilege role. FACES-WI-C (WI-19) will wire role guard. Source: eva-ado-dashboard.epic.yaml.

feature_flags.label: Retrieve — read sessions and session history
Ingest — upload and process documents
feature_flags.notes: FeatureID.ACTION_INGEST = 'action.ingest'. Write operations on documents. Source: features.py.

feature_flags.label: Search — search documents and tags
feature_flags.notes: FeatureID.ACTION_SEARCH = 'action.search'. Read operations on documents. Source: features.py.

feature_flags.label: Admin — manage UI translation strings
feature_flags.notes: FeatureID.ACTION_ADMIN_TRANSLATIONS = 'action.admin.translations'. Sprint 5. Route file not yet implemented.

feature_flags.label: Admin — manage application settings
feature_flags.notes: FeatureID.ACTION_ADMIN_SETTINGS = 'action.admin.settings'. Sprint 5. Route file not yet implemented.

feature_flags.label: Admin — manage app registry
feature_flags.notes: FeatureID.ACTION_ADMIN_APPS = 'action.admin.apps'. Sprint 6. Route file not yet implemented.

feature_flags.label: Admin — create and manage Entra ID users
feature_flags.notes: Decorator: @require_feature('action.admin.manage_users'). Not in FeatureID enum (features.py); admin.py is an optional/pre-existing router. Prefix /v1/admin TBD.

feature_flags.label: Admin — list Entra ID groups
feature_flags.notes: Decorator: @require_feature('action.admin.view_groups'). Not in FeatureID enum (features.py); admin.py is an optional/pre-existing router. Prefix /v1/admin TBD.

containers.label: Ingestion Jobs

fields.name: progress
fields.description: Pipeline stage progress: parsed, enriched, chunked, embedded, indexed

fields.name: metrics
fields.description: Run metrics: total_chunks, total_tokens, embedding_cost_usd, processing_time_ms

containers.notes: Source: cosmos_service.py. Written by ingestion pipeline, read by ingest routes.

containers.label: Extracted Document Content
containers.notes: Source: cosmos_service.py. Intermediate extraction store; detail fields partially inferred.

containers.label: Document Chunks
containers.notes: Source: cosmos_service.py. TTL = 30 days (2592000 s). Temp store before Azure AI Search indexing. Fields partially inferred.

containers.label: Audit Logs (Lane A)
containers.notes: Source: cosmos_service.py. Permanent audit trail — no TTL. Written by AuditLogger.log_lane_a().

containers.label: Content Access Logs (Break-Glass)
containers.notes: Source: cosmos_service.py. TTL = 24 h (86400 s). Break-glass / privileged access tracking.

containers.label: Chat Sessions
containers.notes: Source: sessions.py (sessions_container='sessions'). Partition key inferred as /actor_oid. TTL 30 d inferred from session_service(ttl_days=30).

containers.label: Chat Messages
containers.notes: Source: sessions.py (messages_container='messages'). Partition key inferred as /session_id.

containers.label: Sprint Data Cache
containers.notes: PROJECT-39 WI-0. Provisioned 2026-02-20. az cosmosdb sql container create --database-name eva-foundation --name scrum-cache --partition-key-path /sprint_key --ttl 86400

containers.label: App Registry
containers.notes: admin-face AppsPage (WI-4). Planned brain-v2 App Registry endpoint.

screens.notes: FACES-WI-A / WI-17 IN PROGRESS 2026-02-20. 23 product tiles, 5 categories, mock sprint badges. GC Design System only. WCAG 2.1 AA. Live badges deferred to post-APIM (WI-1 Mar 2026).

agents.label: Screen Generator
agents.notes: ScreenGeneratorAgent: parses Epic YAML ScreenSpec, queries EVA UI metadata for component examples, calls Azure OpenAI to produce production-ready TypeScript/React screen. Bilingual support enforced. Falls back to template when LLM response is < 100 chars.

agents.label: Test Generator
agents.notes: TestGeneratorAgent Phase 2: generates minimal vitest + jest-axe scaffold. Full behavioural + coverage tests using shared/eva-ui examples deferred to Phase 3. Currently a stub that unblocks mode=full piepline.

agents.label: Validator
agents.notes: ValidatorAgent: runs 4 quality gates — TypeScript compile (npm run type-check), test pass rate + coverage (npm run test:coverage), accessibility (npm run test:a11y), Government of Canada compliance (static analysis). No LLM call — pure subprocess/toolchain. Thresholds loaded from config/quality_gates.py.

infrastructure.notes: gpt-5.1-chat deployment. Endpoint: https://marco-sandbox-openai-v2.openai.azure.com/
gpt-5.1-chat deployment for agent-fleet. Endpoint: https://esdaicoe-ai-foundry-openai.openai.azure.com/
Index: proj10-index. Env var AZURE_SEARCH_INDEX holds the index name.
Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL. Shared by eva-brain-api and eva-roles-api.
Parent database for all EVA Cosmos containers.
Ingest job tracker. Partition key: /actor_oid.
Service health and operational status. Partition key: /service_id.
Document metadata records. Partition key: /actor_oid.
Text chunks + embeddings. Partition key: /document_id. TTL: 90 days.
Document tags and taxonomy. Partition key: /actor_oid.
Conversation sessions. Partition key: /actor_oid. TTL: 90 days.
Chat messages within sessions. Partition key: /session_id.
Azure Blob Storage for document uploads and processed content.
Blob container for raw document uploads before ingest processing.
Application Insights for telemetry. Connection string empty in dev .env.
Service principal. AZURE_TENANT_ID + AZURE_CLIENT_ID + AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET. Dev bypasses via DEV_BYPASS_OID.
Azure API Management gateway fronting all /v1/* EVA Brain endpoints. Import scheduled Mar 29-30, 2026.
Container App running uvicorn on port 8001. All AZURE_* env vars injected at runtime.
Container App running the roles/RBAC service on port 8002.
Container App running the agent-fleet FastAPI orchestrator on port 8003.
Azure Static Web App for admin-face. Deployment scheduled Phase 4 (Mar 25-31, 2026).
Azure Static Web App for chat-face. Deployment scheduled Phase 4 (Mar 25-31, 2026).
Azure Key Vault. Secrets configuration scheduled Mar 31 - Apr 4, 2026.

requirements.title: Admin screens and backend integration

requirements.title: Chat UI and agent framework integration

requirements.title: Testing and Azure SWA deployment

requirements.title: Fix router prefix for sessions, search, config, ingest, admin

requirements.notes: feature_flags.json action.chat only lists lawyer/paralegal — support persona missing.

requirements.notes: MockBackendService has 82 inline keys. Config and apps endpoints are present in brain-api.

requirements.title: Import EVA Brain API into marco-sandbox-apim
requirements.notes: Scheduled Mar 29-30, 2026. OpenAPI spec needs to be finalised first.

requirements.title: Configure Key Vault secrets for all services

requirements.title: Scaffold Playwright E2E tests for admin and chat faces
